case_title: MARK BEYLIN VS. SHANAH HERNANDES et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-01-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDES, SHANAH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-25-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-25-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MAURICIO HERNANDES ONLY. CKERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BEYLIN, MARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDES, SHANAH HERNANDES, MAURICIO $6,983.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,128.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2012 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO MAY-16-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT IS TO RETURN WITH A SPANISH INTERPRETER. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-16-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-16-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER-ALDO ESPINOZA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
